summary: Phase 1 WordPress plugin intake + UX iteration tested end-to-end. Backend: 53/53 pytest tests pass (40 pre-existing regression + 13 new intake tests covering token auth, form_id→source mapping for 1/17/32/unknown, fuzzy/case-insensitive field mapping, persistence, GET /intake/config, /intake/recent ordering and admin-only, /intake/download-plugin zip validation). Frontend (Playwright on public URL): Sidebar 'Form Intake' nav item correctly positioned between Enquiries and Airtable Inspector; /form-intake page renders all 10 testids (panel-intro/credentials/install/recent, endpoint-url-input, intake-token-input, copy-endpoint, copy-token, toggle-token-visibility, download-plugin-button); 3 form-mapping cards present; endpoint URL populated with /api/intake/gravity-forms; token initially masked (type=password) → toggle reveals correct token value (type=text); 6-step install guide; recent submissions table renders rows from backend tests; plugin download returns 4501-byte zip with correct content-type and Content-Disposition; Franchisees thumbnails verified as w-11 h-11 (44px) — no w-9/h-9 found.

minor.issue: endpoint_url is built from FRONTEND_URL env var, not from request host. Works because preview ingress routes /api to backend, but if the admin UI is ever served from a different host than the WordPress endpoint, the value will be wrong. Consider using request.url.scheme + host or making it a separate INTAKE_PUBLIC_URL env.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Document endpoint_url source in /api/intake/config so admins know it follows FRONTEND_URL, or compute from request host for robustness.
(Cosmetic, carried over from iter 3) Add data-testid='panel-status' to franchisee hero card.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~939 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Strongly recommend splitting into auth.py, airtable.py, intake.py, dashboard.py, crm.py modules.

_pick() fuzzy matcher uses substring containment ('c_lower in k or k in c_lower') which is order-dependent on dict iteration and can cause unintended matches (e.g. 'Email' candidate could partially match 'Mobile Email Address' if such a field existed). Consider exact-match first pass over ALL candidates before falling back to substring.
/api/intake/download-plugin reads plugin files synchronously inside an async handler — fine for tiny files but should ideally use aiofiles or run_in_executor.

INTAKE_TOKEN is checked but no rate-limiting or replay protection on /api/intake/gravity-forms; consider light per-IP throttling and an idempotency check on gravity_entry_id to prevent duplicate inserts on retry.
Carried over: /api/contacts capped at limit=2000 with no skip; anniversaries N+1 lookups; dashboard could use asyncio.gather.

success_rate.backend: 100% (53/53 — 13 new intake tests + 40 regression: backend_test 17, test_phase1_crm 16, test_phase1_ux 7; migration runner test deselected to avoid 60s reload)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on all critical flows for this iteration

seed_data_creation: Created 6 web_form_contacts records with gravity_entry_id starting 'TEST-' during intake tests. Cleanup teardown in test_phase1_intake.py removes them (deletes any gravity_entry_id ~/^TEST-/). After the final test run the cleanup ran, so no residual TEST_ data should remain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite is now 4 files: backend_test.py (17), test_phase1_crm.py (16+2 deselected), test_phase1_ux.py (7), test_phase1_intake.py (13) — 53 total run. INTAKE_TOKEN env var must be present in /app/backend/.env. Intake endpoint is at /api/intake/gravity-forms and is the ONLY intake endpoint that does NOT require admin cookies — it auths via X-Intake-Token header. /api/intake/config, /api/intake/recent, /api/intake/download-plugin all require admin auth. Frontend testids for FormIntakePage: nav-form-intake, panel-intro, panel-credentials, panel-install, panel-recent, endpoint-url-input, intake-token-input, copy-endpoint, copy-token, toggle-token-visibility, download-plugin-button, recent-table. Default token input type=password; toggle-token-visibility switches to text. Franchisees thumbnails confirmed at w-11 h-11.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All requested behaviour is implemented correctly.
